mapper.sql: fm.id, fm.created_time, fm.created_timestamp, fm.created_by, fm.modified_time, fm.modified_timestamp, fm.modified_by, fm.version, fm.status, fm.code, fm.name, fm.model_version, fm.form_type, fm.seq, fm.build_in_flag

fm.id, fm.created_time, fm.created_timestamp, fm.created_by, fm.created_id, fm.modified_time, fm.modified_timestamp, fm.modified_by, fm.modified_id, fm.deleted, fm.version, fm.remark, fm.build_in_flag, fm.status, fm.code, fm.name, fm.model_version, fm.form_type, fm.form_path, fm.seq, fm.category_id, fm.form_id
mapper.select:
select
,
from flow_model fm left join flow_model_extend fme on fm.id = fme.model_id where fm.deleted = 0 and fm.status = #{status} and fm.code = #{code} order by fm.model_version desc limit 1
